summary: Iteration 126: Comprehensive testing of visual 'WOW' game feel effects. All features verified working correctly - Pipeline step bar with 9 animated steps, CSS animations, film card hover effects, error boundaries, notification popups, and haptic feedback.
critical_code_review_comments: All CSS animations properly defined in index.css: step-complete-pop, step-glow-gold, check-appear, step-breathe, step-glow-current, connector-wave, step-locked-pulse, cs-icon-rotate, cs-countdown-pulse, cs-progress-fill, card-glow, glitch-1, glitch-scanlines, film-grain, notif-slide-in, notif-exit
Flame icon properly imported from lucide-react at line 17 of FilmPipeline.jsx
Haptic feedback implemented via navigator.vibrate() on step bar clicks (line 24, 121)
MiniStepBar component exported from ErrorBoundary.jsx and used in film cards
Reduced motion support implemented via @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all tabs render, step bar visible, no console errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: All visual game feel effects verified working: 1) Pipeline step bar renders 9 steps with correct data-testids, 2) CSS animations defined and applied (step-completed, step-current, connector-active classes found), 3) Film cards have film-card-hover class (5 found), 4) Mini step bars present on film cards (5 found), 5) Error boundaries implemented with cinematic messages, 6) All 6 tabs render without crashes, 7) Mobile responsive with scrollable step bar, 8) No Flame icon errors.

pipeline_step_bar.details: 9 steps found: idea, trama, location, poster, coming_soon, casting, script, production, release
